title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. caespitosum
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. caespitosum, also known as the yellow button or creeping yellow button, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. caespitosum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential therapeutic effects.
